game_info.title: Untitled Game
game_info.concept: True Skate is a physics-based simulation where players control a virtual skateboard using intuitive finger gestures on the screen to perform tricks like ollies, kickflips, and grinds within various skateparks. Swiping up/down/sideways executes tricks, while dragging the board steers, with precise timing and movement dictating trick recognition and score.
game_info.description: Shred the skatepark and rack up points by performing tricks! Control your skateboard through a realistic physics simulation. Perform ollies, kickflips, grinds, and manuals to score points. Chain tricks together for combo multipliers. Master the timing and physics to become a skate legend!
game_info.controls:
Arrow Up: Ollie (jump)
Arrow Down: Manual (balance on back wheels)
Arrow Left: Kickflip left
Arrow Right: Kickflip right
Space: Push (gain speed)
A/D: Steer left/right
W: Grind rail (when near)
